description_long: This is a matte white vase with a rounded, bulbous body and a wide, flared opening at the top. The front of the vase features stylized, raised circular motifs resembling owl eyes, with a subtle beak-like protrusion between them, giving the vase an owl-inspired appearance. The sides of the vase are smooth except for the continuation of the eye motifs, and the back is plain with no additional decoration. The surface appears to be ceramic or plaster, with a soft, powdery finish and no visible glazing or gloss. The vase is hollow, designed to hold flowers or other decorative items, and its sturdy base allows it to stand upright on flat surfaces. Its whimsical design makes it suitable for both outdoor urban parks and indoor decorative settings.
description: A matte white, owl-themed vase with a rounded body, flared rim, and raised circular eye motifs on the front. The surface is smooth and unglazed, giving it a soft, ceramic appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the owl-like face with raised circular eyes and a beak-shaped detail beneath the wide, flared rim.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the profile of the eye motif and the rounded body, with the rim and beak detail partially visible.
description_view_2: Back view displays a plain, smooth surface with no decorative features, highlighting the vase's bulbous shape.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side of the eye motif and the rounded form, with the rim and beak detail partially visible.
attribute_location: urban park bench or garden table
